items.d: the big thing in the sky that gives us light in the day
items.s: The ___ was very hot, so we had a lot of orange juice.
items.sbRef: WB p.50, reading 'Lost in the forest'
items.hintDe: Steht am Himmel und scheint am Tag.

items.d: the big place fish live in, next to the beach
items.s: We played in the ___ all day on our holiday at the beach.
items.hintDe: Das große, salzige Wasser am Strand.

items.d: the place where the land meets the sea and you can play
items.s: We can play on the ___ next to the sea all day.
items.hintDe: Hier triffst du Sand und das Meer.

items.d: a place where many people live, bigger than a village
items.s: Our ___ is bigger than a village, with lots of streets and people.
items.hintDe: Größer als ein Dorf, mit vielen Straßen.

items.d: a very big road where cars and trucks go very fast
items.s: The cars go fast on the big ___ to Vienna.
items.sbRef: SB p.50, 'We are a long way from the motorway!'
items.hintDe: Die große, schnelle Straße zwischen Städten.

items.d: the long thing that cars and trucks drive on
items.s: Cars and trucks drive on the new ___ from our village.
items.hintDe: Hier fahren Autos und Lastwagen.

items.d: the long thing that fish live in and runs to the sea
items.s: There are lots of fish in the ___ that runs down to the sea.
items.hintDe: Wasser, das durch das Land zum Meer fließt.

items.d: a very small place in the country, smaller than a town
items.s: My grandma lives in a small ___ in the mountains, not a big town.
items.hintDe: Kleiner als eine Stadt, nur wenige Häuser.

items.d: the big open green land on a farm
items.s: Sheep eat in the big green ___ next to the farm.
items.sbRef: SB p.50, 'There were lots of sheep running through the field'
items.hintDe: Das große, offene Land auf dem Bauernhof.

items.d: high green land smaller than the mountains
items.s: We can run up the small green ___ and look at the town down there.
items.hintDe: Hoch, aber kleiner als ein Berg.

items.d: the green land down in the middle of the mountains
items.s: A river runs down the green ___ in the middle of the mountains.
items.sbRef: SB p.50, 'Just past a small town and through the valley'
items.hintDe: Das tiefe Land mitten zwischen den Bergen.

items.d: a big area of water, smaller than the sea
items.s: We can go canoeing on the ___ in the mountains; it is cold up there!
items.sbRef: SB p.51, 'climbed up to the top of the waterfall and jumped into the lake'
items.hintDe: Großes Wasser mit Land rundherum.
items.note: lake def needs 'water' (no taught synonym); single-token gloss.

items.d: a big place with lots of trees
items.s: There are lots of tall trees in the dark ___ near the camp.
items.sbRef: SB p.50, 'a short drive into a big forest'
items.hintDe: Ein großer Ort mit vielen Bäumen.

items.d: the very high land you climb up with snow on it
items.s: There was white snow high on the ___.
items.sbRef: WB p.46, exercise 3 'mountain forest hills moon'
items.hintDe: Sehr hohes Land mit Schnee oben.

items.d: small lights high in the sky at night
items.s: At night we looked at the ___ and the moon in the dark sky.
items.sbRef: WB p.51, reading 'there were lots of stars and the moon was very bright'
items.hintDe: Die kleinen Lichter am Nachthimmel.

items.d: the big light in the sky at night
items.s: At night the ___ was big and bright in the dark sky.
items.sbRef: WB p.51, reading 'the moon was very bright'
items.hintDe: Scheint am Himmel in der Nacht.
items.note: carrier 'bright' from WB source is above level; single-token gloss.

items.d: to make a small room up high in the leaves
items.s: My dad helped me ___ in the big tree.
items.hintDe: Ein kleines Zimmer oben in einem Baum machen.

items.d: a place where children stay outside on holiday
items.s: We played in the sea all day on our summer ___.
items.hintDe: Ein Ort, wo Kinder draußen im Urlaub bleiben.

items.d: you wear this in a canoe so you do not go under
items.s: You have to wear a ___ in the canoe all the time.
items.sbRef: SB p.49, 'a life jacket in the boat all the time'
items.hintDe: Trägst du im Kanu, damit du oben bleibst.

items.d: the man or woman who looks after a group at the camp
items.s: The ___ showed the group the canoe.
items.sbRef: SB p.50, 'talking to the guides ... I'm one of the guides'
items.hintDe: Diese Person kümmert sich im Camp um die Gruppe.

items.d: you make this outside at night and tell scary stories in the dark
items.s: In the dark forest there was a ___, and we had fun in the light of the fire.
items.sbRef: SB p.51, 'we sat around the campfire in the middle of the forest'
items.hintDe: Machst du draußen in der Nacht; alle sitzen darum.

items.d: food and drink you bring to eat outside
items.s: We had a ___ near the river with sandwiches and orange juice.
items.sbRef: SB p.52, email 'we went down the river ... and then we had a picnic'
items.hintDe: Essen und Trinken, das du draußen isst.

items.d: a small light thing you go down the river in
items.s: The children can go down the river in a small ___.
items.sbRef: SB p.50, 'visit a waterfall by canoe'
items.hintDe: Das kleine Boot, mit dem du den Fluss hinunterfährst.

items.d: going down a river in a small canoe
items.s: ___ down the river in a canoe is great fun at camp.
items.sbRef: SB p.50, 'go canoeing, rock climbing'
items.hintDe: Mit dem Kanu den Fluss hinunterfahren.

items.d: white river going down high rocks
items.s: We can visit a ___ in the forest near the camp.
items.sbRef: SB p.50, 'visit a waterfall by canoe'
items.hintDe: Das weiße Wasser, das die hohen Felsen hinunterfällt.

items.d: Going up very high places for fun.
items.s: You can do ___ on the high rocks at the camp, but be careful!
items.sbRef: SB p.49, 'GO ROCK CLIMBING!'
items.hintDe: An hohen Felsen oder einer Wand hochklettern.

items.d: the place down at the end of a thing
items.s: The lake is at the ___ of the picture.
items.sbRef: MORE Words and Phrases: 'The lake is on the bottom left corner of the picture.'
items.hintDe: Ganz unten an einem Ding.
items.note: def avoids untaught 'part'/'lowest'/'low' and the headword 'bottom'; uses 'the place down at the end of a thing'.

items.d: The side that is not the right one.
items.s: On the ___ side there's a lake.
items.sbRef: MORE Words and Phrases: 'On the left-hand side there's a lake.'
items.hintDe: Auf der Seite deiner linken Hand.
items.note: masterlist exampleSb carrier; 'side' above level so glossed to keep textbook sentence.

items.d: the inside place of a thing, not at the end
items.s: In the ___ of the forest there was a campfire.
items.sbRef: MORE Words and Phrases: 'We sat around the campfire in the middle of the forest.'
items.hintDe: Genau in der Mitte, nicht am Rand.

items.d: The side that is not the left one.
items.s: On the ___ side there's a waterfall.
items.sbRef: MORE Words and Phrases: 'On the right-hand side there's a waterfall.'
items.hintDe: Auf der Seite deiner rechten Hand.
items.note: masterlist exampleSb carrier; 'side' above level so glossed to keep textbook sentence.

items.d: a jacket you wear on cold and wet days
items.s: Wear an ___ near the waterfall.
items.sbRef: MORE Words and Phrases: 'Wear an anorak near the waterfall.'
items.hintDe: Eine Jacke für kalte und nasse Tage.

items.d: a strong thing you put on to build a tree house or climb
items.s: When you build a tree house, you have to wear a ___.
items.sbRef: MORE Words and Phrases: 'Wear a hard hat when building a tree house.'
items.hintDe: Ein starker Hut zum Bauen oder Klettern.

items.d: more than very
items.s: The guides were ___ angry when Bob jumped in the lake.
items.sbRef: SB p.51, 'But the guides were absolutely furious!'
items.hintDe: Stärker als 'sehr', ganz und gar.

items.d: really, when it is a surprise
items.s: The rest of the day was ___ fun.
items.sbRef: SB p.51, 'The rest of the day was actually fun!'
items.hintDe: In Wirklichkeit, auch wenn man etwas anderes dachte.
items.note: carrier mirrors SB sentence; 'rest' above level so glossed.

items.d: a holiday place where children climb and have fun outside
items.s: We are going to spend three days at the ___ in the mountains.
items.sbRef: MORE Words and Phrases: 'The children are going to spend some days at the adventure camp.'
items.hintDe: Ein Urlaubsort, wo Kinder draußen klettern und Spaß haben.

items.d: to be scared of a thing that can hurt you
items.s: The shepherd boy was not ___ of the dark forest.
items.sbRef: SB p.51, 'He wasn't afraid. He jumped down into the lake!'
items.hintDe: Vor etwas Angst haben, das dir wehtun kann.
items.note: headword indexes as phrase 'be afraid'; bare carrier blank avoids the token, MC/def avoid 'afraid'.

items.d: this is like 'but still'
items.s: I enjoyed it, ___ I wasn't very good at it.
items.sbRef: MORE Words and Phrases: 'I enjoyed it, although I wasn't good at it.'
items.hintDe: Verbindet zwei Teile wie 'aber trotzdem'.

items.d: to look after a thing or a friend because you love them
items.s: The boy didn't ___ about the rules.
items.sbRef: MORE Words and Phrases: 'The boy didn't care.'
items.hintDe: Sich um etwas kümmern, weil es dir wichtig ist.

items.d: a long time going somewhere in a car
items.s: It was a long ___ in the car to the camp.
items.sbRef: MORE Words and Phrases: 'It was a short drive into the forest.'
items.hintDe: Wenn du lange im Auto irgendwohin fährst.
items.note: noun 'Fahrt'; carrier makes the noun sense unambiguous via 'a long ___ in the car'.

items.d: A big door you open to go into a field or garden.
items.s: There was a huge ___ with a big sign on it.
items.sbRef: MORE Words and Phrases: 'There was a huge gate with a big sign on it.'
items.hintDe: Eine große Tür in einer Mauer, durch die du gehst.
items.note: masterlist exampleSb carrier; 'sign' above level so glossed to keep textbook sentence.

items.d: to do a thing really well
items.s: I wasn't very ___ building a tree house.
items.sbRef: MORE Words and Phrases: 'I wasn't very good at building a tree house.'
items.hintDe: Etwas wirklich gut machen können.
items.note: carrier blank takes 'good at' so 'be' stays in the frame; matches SB sentence.

items.d: the first thing you read in a story about long ago
items.s: ___, there was a young shepherd boy who lived in the forest.
items.sbRef: MORE Words and Phrases: 'Once upon a time, there was a young boy who lived in this forest.'
items.hintDe: So beginnen alte Geschichten von früher.

items.d: the white farm thing a shepherd looks after on the hill
items.s: There were lots of ___ in the green fields.
items.sbRef: MORE Words and Phrases: 'There were lots of sheep in the fields.'
items.hintDe: Das weiße Tier, um das sich der Schäfer kümmert.
items.note: def avoids untaught 'animal'/'wool'; uses the shepherd relation (non-circular for 'sheep').

items.d: the boy or girl who looks after sheep on a hill
items.s: The ___ boy looked after the sheep on the hill.
items.sbRef: MORE Words and Phrases: 'The shepherd boy loved to play in the forest.'
items.hintDe: Der oder die sich um die Schafe kümmert.

items.d: to think a friend is good and tell them your secrets
items.s: You have to ___ me. I am your friend.
items.sbRef: MORE Words and Phrases: 'Follow me! You can trust me.'
items.hintDe: Glauben, dass ein Freund gut ist.

items.d: a short time, not long
items.s: We waited for a ___ and then the train arrived.
items.sbRef: MORE Words and Phrases: 'We chatted with our friends for a while.'
items.hintDe: Eine kurze Zeit, nicht lange.

items.d: to clean the plates after dinner
items.s: We don't have to ___ the dirty plates after dinner.
items.sbRef: MORE Words and Phrases: 'We don't have to wash up.'
items.hintDe: Nach dem Essen das Geschirr sauber machen.

items.d: not dead, still living
items.s: The boy was hurt, but he was still ___.
items.sbRef: SB p.53, Story of the Stones 'Darkman is alive.'
items.hintDe: Nicht tot, noch am Leben.

items.d: a call for help when you are hurt or scared
items.s: There was a ___ for help from the river.
items.sbRef: SB p.53, Story of the Stones 'The children hear a cry for help.'
items.hintDe: Ein lauter Ruf, wenn jemand Hilfe braucht.
items.note: noun 'Schrei'; carrier 'a ___ for help' fixes the noun sense.

items.d: what you tell people when you go
items.s: ___ Bye! I need to catch my train.
items.sbRef: SB p.53, Everyday English 'I'm off now.'
items.hintDe: Sagst du, wenn du jetzt gehst.

items.d: what you tell a friend who is sad or hurt
items.s: ___! You look very hungry and sad.
items.sbRef: SB p.53, Everyday English 'Poor you! You look very hungry.'
items.hintDe: Sagst du zu jemandem, dem es schlecht geht.
